# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source is institute-worthy because it presents a research preprint with concrete benchmark design and reported evaluation results.

## Why

The excerpt clearly describes a formal arXiv preprint introducing ABC-Bench, a benchmark for agentic backend coding in realistic executable workflows. It reports a curated dataset of 224 practical tasks across 8 languages and 19 frameworks and states that an extensive evaluation was conducted, revealing performance gaps in current models. That is real empirical substance, not commentary or promotion.

## Limits
